'''dhamogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smacovirus|smacovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smacovirus|smacovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhamogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmegeth|dhæmegeth]] || [[word:dhæmegej|dhæmegej]] || [[word:dhæmegesh|dhæmegesh]] || [[word:dhæmege|dhæmege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamomogoth|dhamomogoth]] || [[word:dhamomogoj|dhamomogoj]] || [[word:dhamomogosh|dhamomogosh]] || [[word:dhamomogo|dhamomogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamogoth|dhamogoth]] || [[word:dhamogoj|dhamogoj]] || [[word:dhamogosh|dhamogosh]] || [[word:dhamogo|dhamogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamofgoth|dhamofgoth]] || [[word:dhamofgoj|dhamofgoj]] || [[word:dhamofgosh|dhamofgosh]] || [[word:dhamofgof|dhamofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamogotho|dhamogotho]] || [[word:dhamogojo|dhamogojo]] || [[word:dhamogosho|dhamogosho]] || [[word:dhamogoko|dhamogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamogoth|dhamogoth]] || [[word:dhamogoj|dhamogoj]] || [[word:dhamogosh|dhamogosh]] || [[word:dhamogo|dhamogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamogothol|dhamogothol]] || [[word:dhamogojol|dhamogojol]] || [[word:dhamogoshol|dhamogoshol]] || [[word:dhamogokol|dhamogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamogothotho|dhamogothotho]] || [[word:dhamogojojo|dhamogojojo]] || [[word:dhamogoshosho|dhamogoshosho]] || [[word:dhamogoko|dhamogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamogothon|dhamogothon]] || [[word:dhamogojon|dhamogojon]] || [[word:dhamogoshon|dhamogoshon]] || [[word:dhamogokon|dhamogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamogothoro|dhamogothoro]] || [[word:dhamogojoro|dhamogojoro]] || [[word:dhamogoshoro|dhamogoshoro]] || [[word:dhamogokoro|dhamogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
